children.heading: Finality of decisions of Director
children.label: a Finality of decisions of Director
children.text: shall apply in the administration of chapter 84 of title 5 with respect to employees of the Agency.Section 2011(c) of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), shall apply with respect to employees of the Agency who are not participants in the Central Intelligence Agency Retirement and Disability System and are not designated under .section 8461(e) of title 5section 2152(a) of this title
